prep.summary: Review your May 7 discussion with Sarah Cook—where you aligned on keeping Salesforce marketing systems separated from operational architecture—to maintain baseline vendor standards. Note that no work notes were found regarding your last 1-on-1 with Amit—requiring a direct update from him during your sync—though CRM topics remain focused on leveraging out-of-the-box Salesforce capabilities rather than building costly custom integrations.
tasks: Confirm the status of the AWS Connect and Twilio integration—designed to bypass Hi Marley for policy servicing—to protect the existing operational ecosystem.
Reaffirm the commitment to out-of-the-box Salesforce capabilities—specifically customer data platforms—to avoid over-engineering the current CRM setup.
Request a direct update from Amit regarding your last 1-on-1—given the complete absence of matching records in your work notes folder—to close the information gap.
Verify the current state of KPMG's reference architecture data gathering—initiated under Dan Griffiths's transition—to anticipate upcoming structural changes.
